title: 生产延误的专业解释
theme: 从 material delay / machine issue / recovery plan 开始
goals: 能说明生产延误的具体原因，而不是只说 sorry delay
能解释延误影响、给出 revised timeline，并提出 recovery plan
能在客户追问时表达会 catch up，但不做不现实承诺

review.title: Day 17 复习
items: 昨天练了 urgent order、push factory、fastest schedule、expedite、priority 和 realistic timeline。
今天处理更难的情况：即使你推动了工厂，生产仍然可能因为材料、机器或质量问题延误。
客户最需要的不是一句 sorry，而是清楚知道原因、影响、补救动作和新的时间表。

preview.scenario: 订单生产中出现材料到货晚、机器故障或质量返工。客户催问为什么没按计划完成，你需要解释事实、承担沟通责任，并给出新的可执行时间线。
needToKnow: material delay 和 machine issue 是常见生产延误原因，但要说明影响到哪个环节。
quality rework 表示为了保证质量而返工，不要说成 factory mistake。
recovery plan 可以让客户看到你在解决问题，而不是被动等待。

vocabulary.meaning: 材料延误 / 材料到货晚
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明原材料、配件、包装材料等没有按计划到位。
vocabulary.example: There is a material delay from our supplier.

vocabulary.meaning: 机器问题 / 设备问题
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明设备故障、调机异常或产线暂时停顿。
vocabulary.example: A machine issue affected today's production output.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明为了达到质量标准而重新处理产品。
vocabulary.example: We need quality rework to make sure the goods meet the standard.

vocabulary.usage: 用于解释问题真正来源，而不是只描述表面现象。
vocabulary.example: We are checking the root cause with our production team.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明问题对交期、数量、质量或成本的影响。
vocabulary.example: The impact on the delivery date is about two days.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明延误后的新生产或出货安排。
vocabulary.example: I will send you the revised timeline today.

vocabulary.meaning: 赶上进度 / 追回进度
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明工厂会通过加班、调产线等方式尽量追回时间。
vocabulary.example: We will try to catch up by adding extra working hours.

vocabulary.meaning: 补救计划 / 追赶计划
vocabulary.usage: 用于给客户说明如何减少延误影响。
vocabulary.example: We have prepared a recovery plan to reduce the delay.

sentences.label: 说明材料延误
sentences.natural: There is a material delay from our supplier.
sentences.business: There is a material delay from our supplier, and it may affect the production timeline by about two days.

sentences.label: 说明机器问题
sentences.natural: A machine issue affected today's production output.
sentences.business: A machine issue affected today's production output, but our maintenance team is working on it now.

sentences.label: 解释质量返工
sentences.natural: We need quality rework to make sure the goods meet the standard.
sentences.business: We need quality rework for part of the goods to make sure the final quality meets the approved standard.

sentences.label: 给更新后的时间线
sentences.natural: I will send you the revised timeline today.
sentences.business: After we confirm the root cause and production impact, I will send you the revised timeline today.

sentences.label: 提出补救计划
sentences.natural: We will try to catch up by adding extra working hours.
sentences.business: We have prepared a recovery plan and will try to catch up by adding extra working hours and adjusting the production line.

chatAnalysis.problem: 只道歉没有说明原因、影响和下一步，客户会更焦虑。
chatAnalysis.better: There is a material delay from our supplier.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: There is a material delay from our supplier, and it may affect the production timeline by about two days. I will send you the revised timeline today.

chatAnalysis.problem: factory problem 太笼统，wait 也像让客户被动等待。
chatAnalysis.better: A machine issue affected today's production output.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: A machine issue affected today's production output, but our maintenance team is working on it now, and we are checking the recovery plan.

chatAnalysis.problem: 没有说明怎么补救，也没有说明是否能追回交期。
chatAnalysis.better: We will try to catch up by adding extra working hours.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We have prepared a recovery plan and will try to catch up by adding extra working hours and adjusting the production line.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：解释材料延误

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is the production not finished yet?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: There is a material delay from our supplier.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How many days will it affect?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It may affect the production timeline by about two days, and I will send you the revised timeline today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：机器问题和补救

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: You told us the order would be ready this week.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. A machine issue affected today's production output.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is your solution?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our maintenance team is working on it now, and we are preparing a recovery plan to reduce the delay.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：质量返工导致延误

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This delay is not acceptable. Why did this happen?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your concern. We found that part of the goods needs quality rework.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Does that mean the goods have quality problems?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We are doing the rework to make sure the final quality meets the approved standard before shipment.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：解释延误原因、影响和补救计划

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we expected the goods to be ready this week. What is the current status?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you for checking. I have just confirmed the latest production status with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Is there any delay?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, there is a material delay from our supplier, and it has affected part of the production timeline.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why did you not tell us earlier?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your concern. We were waiting for the supplier's final confirmation, and now we have clearer information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How many days will this delay the order?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The current impact on the delivery date is about two to three days.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This order is urgent. Can you catch up?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We will try to catch up by adding extra working hours after the materials arrive.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Is there any other problem besides the material delay?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: There was also a small machine issue this morning, but our maintenance team has already fixed it.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will the machine issue affect quality?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No, the machine issue mainly affected production output, not product quality.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We cannot accept quality problems.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. That is why we are keeping the necessary quality checks even while trying to catch up.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you need any quality rework?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For a small part of the goods, we need quality rework to make sure they meet the approved standard.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please be honest with us. Can you still ship this month?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Based on the current information, yes, we can still ship this month, but the ready date may move by two to three days.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send us the new timeline.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. After we confirm the root cause and production impact, I will send you the revised timeline today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is your recovery plan?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our recovery plan is to add extra working hours, adjust the production line, and finish packing immediately after inspection.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you give us daily updates until the order is ready?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, I will send you daily updates and keep you posted on the latest production progress.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure there are no more surprises.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will monitor the recovery plan closely and update you immediately if anything changes.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们的供应商出现了材料延误。
exercises.answer: There is a material delay from our supplier.
acceptable: there is a material delay from our supplier
we have a material delay from our supplier

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：sorry delay
exercises.answer: There is a material delay from our supplier, and I will send you the revised timeline today.
acceptable: there is a material delay from our supplier and i will send you the revised timeline today
there is a material delay from our supplier and it may affect the production timeline by about two days
exercises.hint: 要说明原因和新的时间安排。

exercises.prompt: 填空：After we confirm the root cause and production impact, I will send you the revised ____ today.
exercises.hint: revised timeline 是更新后的时间线。

exercises.prompt: 客户问延误后你们怎么补救，哪个回复更适合？
options: We have prepared a recovery plan and will try to catch up by adding extra working hours and adjusting the production line.
exercises.answer: We have prepared a recovery plan and will try to catch up by adding extra working hours and adjusting the production line.
acceptable: we have prepared a recovery plan and will try to catch up by adding extra working hours and adjusting the production line
exercises.hint: 要说清 recovery plan，而不是空泛 hurry。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：机器问题影响了今天的生产产出。
exercises.answer: A machine issue affected today's production output.
acceptable: a machine issue affected todays production output
a machine issue affected today's production output

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you still ship this month? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Based on the current information, yes, we can still ship this month, but the ready date may move by two to three days.
acceptable: based on the current information yes we can still ship this month but the ready date may move by two to three days
based on the current information we can still ship this month but the ready date may move by two to three days
exercises.hint: 既回答 yes，也说明 ready date 可能移动。

homework: 把 material delay、machine issue、quality rework、root cause、impact、revised timeline、catch up、recovery plan 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练原因、影响和补救动作。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：订单延误 2-3 天，原因是材料延误，你要解释影响、给 revised timeline，并提出 recovery plan。
tomorrow: Day 19 会练返工、重做和质量复检，重点说明 rework、reprocessing、recheck 和 quality control。
